query: SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND (TABLE_NAME LIKE '%list%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%member%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%subscri%');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user kmGoXqmAzDGYCHX.75a102e4d6cb --database h57JzrJUFhgVF2g2BrDxyQ --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND (TABLE_NAME LIKE '%list%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%member%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%subscri%');
